name: Patch 2600
explanation: A monophonic semi-modular synthesizer in the spirit of the classic patchable bench instruments. Three oscillators (saw, pulse and triangle) are spread by a shared Detune and can be cross-multiplied by a switchable ring modulator for metallic clangor, then driven into an aggressive resonant low-pass. A dedicated filter ADSR (scaled by Filter Env Amount) sweeps the cutoff while a separate amplitude envelope shapes the level, with Glide for portamento and last-note priority. Controls: Detune, RingMod, Cutoff, Resonance, FilterEnvAmt, Attack, Release, Glide and Level.
